name: Diabetic Orange Sunbeams
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in shortening until crumbly.
3. Add raisins, eggs, orange juice, orange rind, and Sucaryl to the mixture.
4. Mix well.
5. Form into small balls and flatten on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes at 375 degrees.
